data.description:

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for the data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.

Origin Enterprises plc ( (GB:OGN) ) has issued an announcement.

Origin Enterprises plc has announced that Cobas Asset Management has increased its shareholding in the company to 8,438,599 ordinary shares, representing approximately 7.87% of the company’s issued share capital, excluding treasury shares. This development indicates a significant investment interest from Cobas Asset Management, which could impact Origin’s market positioning and stakeholder confidence.

More about Origin Enterprises plc

Origin Enterprises plc is a company that focuses on sustainable land use through technically-led solutions, helping customers maximize their land’s potential. The company holds strong market positions in Ireland, the United Kingdom, Brazil, Poland, and Romania, and is listed on the Euronext Growth Dublin market and the AIM market of the London Stock Exchange.

data.title: Everest Industries Faces Credit Rating Downgrade Amid Profitability Challenges
data.description:
TipRanks Black Friday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for the data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

Everest Industries Limited ( (IN:EVERESTIND) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Everest Industries Limited has experienced a downgrade in its credit ratings by Crisil Ratings for both its long-term and short-term bank facilities, reflecting a weaker-than-expected business risk profile and lower profitability margins in the current fiscal year. Despite these challenges, the company is taking steps to improve its financial health, including diversifying its supplier base for asbestos, adopting six sigma practices to enhance quality, and focusing on higher-margin segments like Boards and Panels. The company’s financial risk profile remains stable with a healthy net worth and low gearing, and it plans to improve profitability and net accruals through strategic management changes and cost-cutting measures.

More about Everest Industries Limited

Everest Industries Limited is a prominent player in the domestic Asbestos Cement (AC) roofing and boards & panel market in India. With a history spanning 90 years, the company has a strong brand presence in the rural market, supported by a vast distribution network of approximately 11,000 retail outlets and over 32 sales depots. The company has diversified its revenue mix by expanding into the Pre-Engineered Building (PEB) segment and increasing its footprint in the Boards and Panels segment, which is expected to yield higher margins.

Average Trading Volume: 1,550

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: 8.63B INR

For a thorough assessment of EVERESTIND stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Digital 9 Infrastructure Updates on Arqiva Stake Sale and Strategic Wind-Down
data.description:
TipRanks Black Friday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for the data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

Digital 9 Infrastructure Plc ( (GB:DGI9) ) has issued an announcement.

Digital 9 Infrastructure plc has announced that minority shareholders of Arqiva Group, represented by Macquarie European Infrastructure Fund II, have agreed to sell their 26.5% stake in Arqiva for £16.5 million. Arqiva, a key provider of broadcasting and smart utility infrastructure in the UK, is a significant asset for Digital 9, representing 75% of its adjusted Gross Asset Value. The company is focused on maximizing shareholder value through a managed wind-down and is cautious about divesting its stake in Arqiva before resolving key contractual and financial decisions.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:DGI9) stock is a Sell with a £0.08 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Digital 9 Infrastructure Plc stock, see the GB:DGI9 Stock Forecast page.

More about Digital 9 Infrastructure Plc

Digital 9 Infrastructure plc (DGI9) is an investment trust listed on the London Stock Exchange, focusing on a managed wind-down strategy to realize its existing assets. The company is part of the FTSE All-Share index and is advised by InfraRed Capital Partners, which manages a substantial portfolio of equity capital globally.

Average Trading Volume: 1,610,527

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Caracal Gold PLC ( (GB:IGLD) ) has provided an announcement.

Imara Gold plc has signed a Memorandum of Understanding with Geowise Resources to form a strategic partnership for gold exploration in Botswana. This partnership aims to leverage Botswana’s attractive gold endowment and stable mining environment to position Imara as a leading gold-focused mining company in Africa, enhancing its operational footprint and reducing investment risks.

data.title: Resources Global Development’s Subsidiary Achieves 2025 Coal Production Target Early
data.description:
TipRanks Black Friday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for the data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

Resources Global Development Limited ( (SG:V7R) ) has provided an announcement.

Resources Global Development Limited announced that its subsidiary’s coal mine, PT Tri Oetama Persada, has achieved its 2025 coal production and sales target of 1,100,000 tonnes ahead of schedule. This milestone marks a substantial increase from the 388,600 tonnes produced in the first half of 2025, highlighting the company’s operational efficiency and growth potential in the Indonesian coal mining sector. The company is now preparing to submit its 2026 production plan, aiming for a target of 3,000,000 tonnes, which could further enhance its market position and stakeholder value.

More about Resources Global Development Limited

Resources Global Development Limited, incorporated in Singapore, operates in the mining industry with a focus on coal production through its subsidiary PT Paragon Karya Perkasa Tbk. The company is involved in the development and management of coal mines, with a significant market focus on Indonesia.

Average Trading Volume: 39,700

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: S$110M

data.description:

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for the data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

Cyviz AS ( (DE:8P9) ) has provided an announcement.

Cyviz AS has secured a significant contract with a leading governmental environmental agency in the UAE, valued at USD 1.33 million, to design and deliver a state-of-the-art Operations Center. This project, expected to be completed by Q2 2026, includes immersive collaboration spaces integrated with Cyviz technology, enhancing real-time monitoring and data visualization to support the agency’s environmental mission. This strategic win reinforces Cyviz’s position as a provider of advanced solutions for command centers in the Middle East, highlighting its commitment to supporting environmental authorities with future-ready technology.

More about Cyviz AS

Cyviz is a global technology provider specializing in comprehensive conference and control rooms, as well as command and experience centers. Established in 1998, the company focuses on creating advanced collaboration spaces that cater to both in-person and remote participants. Cyviz serves global enterprises and governments with high standards for usability, security, and quality, offering a cross-platform experience for managing and controlling systems and resources. The company is listed on Euronext Growth at the Oslo Stock Exchange.

data.description:
TipRanks Black Friday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for the data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

Sosei Group ( (JP:4565) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Nxera Pharma Co., Ltd. has announced a buyback and consent solicitation for its existing convertible bonds due in 2028. The company aims to amend the terms of these bonds to reduce near-term redemption risk and secure liquidity for strategic growth investments. By removing bondholders’ early redemption options and conducting a tender offer up to ¥5 billion, Nxera seeks to maintain lower funding costs and avoid dilutive effects on shareholders.
